title: Whimscape x Fresh Animations
description: Make Fresh Animations compatible with Whimscape!
body:
Make [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) compatible with [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)! This is a patch, not a replacement; _you need to have Fresh Animations installed_ as well.

## Load Order
Whimscape x Fresh Animations is loaded above Fresh Animations, which is loaded above Whimscape.

![Load order for the resource packs: Fresh Animations above Whimscape, this patch on top of both.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NbmssBLT/images/6f7b6008311bd3cc380e757c8ddb887fa095ce0e.png)

Fresh Animations extension packs that I believe currently work without major issues:

- Fresh Animations: Objects (**placed below Whimscape in load order**)
- Fresh Animations: Player Extension (**placed below Whimscape in load order**)
- Fresh Animations: Quivers (missing quiver on bogged)


## Issues?
Please report bugs on the [Whimscape issue tracker on GitHub](https://github.com/kavast/Whimscape-Issues/issues). In other places I'm likely to miss reports or see them much later.
